sentence_reviews.text: A graph transformer combines attention with graph topology, structural encodings, or edge features to model long-range interaction over relational data.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Vaswani et al. Transformer attention plus Battaglia et al. graph-network context; packet lacks a direct graph-transformer source.
sentence_reviews.notes: The claim is technically plausible, but the packet does not cite direct ViT/Perceiver or graph-transformer sources for the exact wording.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Graph transformers is to connect Graph neural networks, Self-attention to downstream capabilities including Drug discovery, protein & molecular design, Knowledge graphs, semantic search & relational reasoning.

sentence_reviews.notes: Dependency portion is supported, but the downstream capability list is graph-derived and not fully established by the cited packet sources.
